section_miscategorizations.text: Continue current medications: Lipitor 40 mg daily, Aspirin, and Metoprolol.
section_miscategorizations.reason: These medications are framed as already current rather than as new or adjusted orders; per the instructions, current medications belong in S unless clearly framed as a treatment change. However, many clinicians document explicit continuation of existing meds in the Plan, so this is more an organizational issue than a misleading error.
